title: arrayJoin usage in doc: generating-test-data#simple-uniform-dataset
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe the issue
I'm reading the guides documents and find that
`arrayJoin(...): randomly selects one of three event types`  is not suitable describe in [https://clickhouse.com/docs/guides/generating-test-data#simple-uniform-dataset](https://clickhouse.com/docs/guides/generating-test-data#simple-uniform-dataset)
maybe use example or change docs for arrayJoin?
```
INSERT INTO user_events
SELECT
generateUUIDv4() AS event_id,
rand() % 10000 AS user_id,
arrayElement(['click','view','purchase'], toUInt32(rand()) % 3 + 1) AS event_type,
now() - INTERVAL rand() % 3600*24 SECOND AS event_time
FROM numbers(1000000);
```
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE user_events (event_id UUID, user_id INTEGER, event_type VARCHAR, event_time TIMESTAMP);

INSERT INTO user_events SELECT generate_uuid() AS event_id, random() % 10000 AS user_id, CASE (random() % 3) WHEN 0 THEN 'click' WHEN 1 THEN 'view' ELSE 'purchase' END AS event_type, now() - INTERVAL (random() % 3600 * 24) SECOND AS event_time FROM range(100000);
CREATE TABLE user_summary (user_id INTEGER, event_count INTEGER);
INSERT INTO user_summary SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM user_events GROUP BY user_id;
SELECT user_id, event_count FROM user_summary WHERE event_count > 10 ORDER BY event_count DESC;
key_bug_features: arrayJoin with random event type selection
